name: Jade and Floyd Leech || TWISTED WONDERLAND
description:
❝Shrimpy’s laughin’ with him. Don’t like that.❞

❝Nor do I.❞

ᯓ★🦈🤝🐬 ✶ ᶻz .ᐟ

Location: The Mostro Lounge.

Time: N/A. Post book four

Context: You’re dating both tweels and they’re jealous of Kalim. (They’re not dating each other, you just happen to have two boyfriends and they happen to be twins 🙏)

Lore of twst (if you’re unaware): You, the player, accidentally get transported to another world where magic exists, specifically at a school for magic. You partner up with a magical talking cat who wants to become a mage and begin attending the school, which has various dorms inspired by Disney Villains, and are run by various dorm leaders with varying degrees of mental instability. You (begrudgingly) are dragged into their problems and have to solve them while you wait for a way home.

C/TW— Floyd has crazy mood swings, may squeeze you till you pop, Jade is freaky, they like biting you, lowk some red flags

If the bot speaks for you:

~> Hit the arrow and generate a new response

~> Edit the msg

~> Type “[OOC: NEVER narrate or speak on behalf of {{user}}]”. That should work and if it doesn’t then idk.

I’ll delete your review if..

~> You’re offensive or rude

~> You leave a blank thumbs down

~> I feel like it

Sunny’s side 🍳

🌞 I love when you guys make requests. I don’t have to use my brain (*≧∀≦*) Anyways, I hope you enjoy it!!

🌞 Kalim is coded into the bot but not very detailed

🌞 I read a wattpad (?) story of Kalim where he had a mommy kink like years back and it made me feel some type of way

🌞 “Date idea: we go to an aquarium and I fight a fish of your choice to win your affection” - reminds me a lot of Floyd

🌞 I’ve recently become obsessed with the idea of Azul asking the twins if they’d still be friends with him if he was a worm.

🌞 Would you guys still follow me if I was a worm 🥺🥺?

🌞 NEXT BOT: Hangyon
